# RadioCard

A card-style radio selection component for rich, selectable card interfaces. Only one card can be selected within a group. Composed of multiple sub-components for flexible content layout.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  RadioCard,
  RadioCardItem,
  RadioCardItemControl,
  RadioCardItemText,
  RadioCardItemDescription,
  RadioCardItemIndicator,
  RadioCardItemHiddenInput,
  RadioCardItemContent,
  RadioCardItemAddon,
  RadioCardLabel,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Chakra Equivalent | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `RadioCard` | `RadioCard.Root` | The root wrapper that groups radio card items for single selection |
| `RadioCardItem` | `RadioCard.Item` | A single selectable radio card item |
| `RadioCardItemControl` | `RadioCard.ItemControl` | The interactive card area within an item |
| `RadioCardItemText` | `RadioCard.ItemText` | The title/label text of the card item |
| `RadioCardItemDescription` | `RadioCard.ItemDescription` | A description below the label |
| `RadioCardItemIndicator` | `RadioCard.ItemIndicator` | The radio indicator (dot) |
| `RadioCardItemHiddenInput` | `RadioCard.ItemHiddenInput` | The hidden native input for form submission |
| `RadioCardItemContent` | `RadioCard.ItemContent` | Container for the text and description within the control |
| `RadioCardItemAddon` | `RadioCard.ItemAddon` | An optional addon section at the bottom of the card item |
| `RadioCardLabel` | `RadioCard.Label` | A label for the entire radio card group |

## RadioCard (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"subtle" \| "surface" \| "outline" \| "solid"` | `"outline"` | The visual variant of the card |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the card |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"gray"` | The color palette for the selected state |
| `value` | `string` | - | Controlled selected value |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | - | Initial selected value for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the selected value changes |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `"horizontal"` | The orientation of the radio card group |
| `align` | `"start" \| "end" \| "center"` | `"start"` | The alignment of the content |
| `justify` | `"start" \| "end" \| "center"` | - | The justification of the content |
| `name` | `string` | - | The name of the input fields (useful for form submission) |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the entire group is disabled |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the group is read-only |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## RadioCardItem Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | **(required)** | The value of this radio card option |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether this specific card item is disabled |
| `invalid` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether this specific card item is invalid |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the item element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<RadioCard defaultValue="basic">
  <RadioCardLabel>Select a plan</RadioCardLabel>
  <RadioCardItem value="basic">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemText>Basic Plan</RadioCardItemText>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
  </RadioCardItem>
  <RadioCardItem value="pro">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemText>Pro Plan</RadioCardItemText>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
  </RadioCardItem>
</RadioCard>
```

### With description

```jsx
<RadioCard defaultValue="next">
  <RadioCardLabel>Select framework</RadioCardLabel>
  <RadioCardItem value="next">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemContent>
        <RadioCardItemText>Next.js</RadioCardItemText>
        <RadioCardItemDescription>Best for apps</RadioCardItemDescription>
      </RadioCardItemContent>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
  </RadioCardItem>
  <RadioCardItem value="vite">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemContent>
        <RadioCardItemText>Vite</RadioCardItemText>
        <RadioCardItemDescription>Best for SPAs</RadioCardItemDescription>
      </RadioCardItemContent>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
  </RadioCardItem>
</RadioCard>
```

### With addon

```jsx
<RadioCard defaultValue="premium" variant="surface">
  <RadioCardLabel>Select plan</RadioCardLabel>
  <RadioCardItem value="premium">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemContent>
        <RadioCardItemText>Premium</RadioCardItemText>
        <RadioCardItemDescription>Unlimited access</RadioCardItemDescription>
      </RadioCardItemContent>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
    <RadioCardItemAddon>Most Popular</RadioCardItemAddon>
  </RadioCardItem>
</RadioCard>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [selected, setSelected] = useState("option1");

<RadioCard value={selected} onValueChange={(e) => setSelected(e.value)}>
  <RadioCardLabel>Choose an option</RadioCardLabel>
  <RadioCardItem value="option1">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemContent>
        <RadioCardItemText>Option 1</RadioCardItemText>
      </RadioCardItemContent>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
  </RadioCardItem>
  <RadioCardItem value="option2">
    <RadioCardItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioCardItemControl>
      <RadioCardItemContent>
        <RadioCardItemText>Option 2</RadioCardItemText>
      </RadioCardItemContent>
      <RadioCardItemIndicator />
    </RadioCardItemControl>
  </RadioCardItem>
</RadioCard>
```

## Component Hierarchy

The expected nesting structure for a complete RadioCard:

```text
RadioCard (Root)
  RadioCardLabel
  RadioCardItem
    RadioCardItemHiddenInput
    RadioCardItemControl
      RadioCardItemContent
        RadioCardItemText
        RadioCardItemDescription
      RadioCardItemIndicator
    RadioCardItemAddon
```

## Features

- Card-style radio for rich single-selection interfaces
- Multiple visual variants: subtle, surface, outline, and solid
- RadioCard (Root) enforces single selection across all RadioCardItem children
- Hidden input for native form submission
- Supports addon section for supplementary content
- Supports horizontal and vertical orientation
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
